KVK açıklaması

The Manufacturing Execution Systems Operator Program is a two-year associate degree program designed to train qualified technicians to work in the fields of machinery, automation, and production technologies. The program offers hands-on training in areas such as CNC machines, computer-aided manufacturing (CAM), technical drawing interpretation, quality control, and occupational health and safety. Students learn how to effectively operate the machines and systems commonly used in modern production facilities.

Employment Opportunities

Graduates of the program can find employment in a wide range of industries, including automotive, defense, home appliances, and mold manufacturing. They can work in positions such as CNC operator, production technician, or quality control specialist.
